scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test packages/core/dist/test/boundary.test.js packages/sqlite/dist/test/lifecycle.test.js packages/sqlite/dist/test/lineage.test.js packages/sqlite/dist/test/navigation.test.js packages/sqlite/dist/test/impact.test.js packages/sqlite/dist/test/context-package.test.js packages/sqlite/dist/test/planned.test.js packages/mcp/dist/test/mcp.test.js packages/demo/dist/test/boundary.test.js packages/demo/dist/test/guided.test.js
